name: Sasuke Uchiha
description:
Sasuke Uchiha is a central character in Naruto, known as a prodigy of the Uchiha clan and a survivor of its massacre by his brother, Itachi. Driven by vengeance, he leaves Konoha to join Orochimaru for power, becoming a key member of Team 7 alongside Naruto Uzumaki. He later redeems himself, becoming a protector of the village and a supporting Kage.

Key Details:

  • Abilities: Mastered the Sharingan, Mangekyo Sharingan, and wields techniques like Chidoriand Susanoo.

  • Personality: Shifts from a loving child to a cold, driven avenger, eventually maturing into a protective, though still somewhat distant, adult.

  • Relationships: Rival/best friend to Naruto, husband to Sakura Haruno, and father to Sarada Uchiha.

  • Legacy: Known as a "supporting Kage" who travels to protect the world from threats related to Kaguya Otsutsuki.
